domain: Spectral sequence E_2 page homological algebra
llm_application: Filter loss by depth; compute E_2 page differentials; trigger depth cap on E_2 stabilization.
novelty_claim: Distinct from R704 (general spectral-sequence cascade) by specifying E_2-page convergence as the exact stopping criterion. Distinct from DARTS (gradient-based NAS) by using algebraic-topological convergence test.
